nasb.text: And one said to the man dressed in linen, who was above the waters of the river, “How long will it be until the end of these wonders?”

esv.text: And someone said to the man clothed in linen, who was above the waters of the stream,  “How long shall it be till the end of these wonders?”

cnv.text: 有一個問那身穿細麻衣、站在河水以上的人，說：“這些奇異的事的結局幾時才到呢？”

ccb.text: 其中一人问身穿细麻衣、站在河水之上的人：“这奇异的事何时才应验呢？”
